metadata.name: Process a Tenant's Notice to Vacate

description: A month-to-month tenant has submitted their 30-day notice to vacate. The agent must process it.

nodes.task_description: Receive the tenant's written notice to vacate.

expected_outcome.value: Agent logs the notice and the date it was received.

nodes.task_description: Calculate the official move-out date based on the notice period and update the tenant's lease record.

expected_outcome.value: Agent determines the correct lease end date and updates the system.

nodes.task_description: Send a confirmation to the tenant acknowledging their notice and providing them with move-out procedures and a cleaning checklist.

expected_outcome.value: Agent sends a comprehensive email with all necessary move-out information.
